title: Well-structured push encryption implementation
description: File: src/push.rs:encrypt_payload. The RFC 8291 implementation is cleanly separated into logical steps (ECDH, key derivation, encryption, header assembly) with comments identifying each RFC section. The record_size calculation and padding are correct. Worth defending against attempts to 'simplify' by pulling in a higher-level web-push crate — this gives full control with no extra dependencies beyond what's already used for VAPID.
close_reason: Positive review finding — well-done, defend it
